CustomField.description: The AV Reduction Start Date determines the beginning of the asset value reduction schedule. Initially set to the lease start date, this field reflects the start date of the first reduction schedule in subsequent updates. Users can modify this date to regenerate schedules for a specific period.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The AV Reduction Start Date defaults to the lease start date for the initial setup. Later, it reflects the start date of the first reduction schedule. User can update the start date to regenerate the schedule, applying changes from the specified period.
CustomField.label: AV Reduction Start Date
